installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# EchoRuins Universal Installation Script (MCJars Fallback)
# Supports LeafMC (official API + MCJars fallback) and other forks via MCJars

mkdir -p /mnt/server
cd /mnt/server || exit 1

apt-get update > /dev/null 2>&1
apt-get install -y curl jq unzip > /dev/null 2>&1

SOFTWARE=${SOFTWARE:-LEAF}
VERSION=${VERSION:-latest}
BUILD=${BUILD:-latest}

log_info() {
    echo -e "[INSTALL] $1"
}

# ---------- LeafMC installation with MCJars fallback ----------
install_leaf() {
    log_info "Installing LeafMC..."

    MC_VERSION=""
    BUILD_ID=""

    # Helper: fetch latest version from Leaf API, fallback to MCJars
    get_latest_leaf_version() {
        local version=$(curl -s "https://api.leafmc.one/v2/projects/leaf/versions" | jq -r '.versions | keys | map(select(. != "latest")) | sort_by(split(".") | map(tonumber)) | last' 2>/dev/null)
        if [[ -z "$version" || "$version" == "null" ]]; then
            log_info "Leaf API failed, falling back to MCJars for version detection..."
            version=$(curl -s "https://mcjars.app/api/v2/builds/LEAF" | jq -r '.builds | to_entries | map(select(.value.type == "RELEASE")) | last | .key')
        fi
        echo "$version"
    }

    # Determine Minecraft version
    if [[ -z "$VERSION" || "$VERSION" == "latest" ]]; then
        MC_VERSION=$(get_latest_leaf_version)
        if [[ -z "$MC_VERSION" || "$MC_VERSION" == "null" ]]; then
            echo "ERROR: Could not determine latest Leaf version. Please specify a version manually (e.g., 1.21.11)."
            exit 1
        fi
        log_info "Latest Minecraft version: $MC_VERSION"
    else
        MC_VERSION="$VERSION"
        log_info "Using specified Minecraft version: $MC_VERSION"
    fi

    # Determine build number
    if [[ -z "$BUILD" || "$BUILD" == "latest" ]]; then
        BUILD_ID=$(curl -s "https://api.leafmc.one/v2/projects/leaf/versions/${MC_VERSION}" | jq -r '.builds | max' 2>/dev/null)
        if [[ -z "$BUILD_ID" || "$BUILD_ID" == "null" ]]; then
            log_info "Leaf API failed, falling back to MCJars for build info..."
            BUILD_ID=$(curl -s "https://mcjars.app/api/v1/builds/LEAF/${MC_VERSION}/latest" | jq -r '.build.id')
        fi
        log_info "Latest build: $BUILD_ID"
    else
        BUILD_ID="$BUILD"
        log_info "Using specified build: $BUILD_ID"
    fi

    # Download the jar – try Leaf CDN first, then MCJars mirror
    DOWNLOAD_URL="https://api.leafmc.one/v2/projects/leaf/versions/${MC_VERSION}/builds/${BUILD_ID}/downloads/leaf-${MC_VERSION}-${BUILD_ID}.jar"
    log_info "Downloading from $DOWNLOAD_URL"
    HTTP_CODE=$(curl -s -o server.jar -w "%{http_code}" "$DOWNLOAD_URL")

    if [[ "$HTTP_CODE" != "200" ]]; then
        log_info "Leaf CDN failed, falling back to MCJars mirror..."
        DOWNLOAD_URL="https://s3.mcjars.app/leaf/versions/${MC_VERSION}/builds/${BUILD_ID}/leaf-${MC_VERSION}-${BUILD_ID}.jar"
        HTTP_CODE=$(curl -s -o server.jar -w "%{http_code}" "$DOWNLOAD_URL")
    fi

    if [[ "$HTTP_CODE" != "200" ]]; then
        echo "ERROR: Failed to download LeafMC server jar from both sources (HTTP $HTTP_CODE)."
        exit 1
    fi

    if [[ ! -f server.jar || $(stat -c%s server.jar) -lt 1000000 ]]; then
        echo "ERROR: Downloaded file is too small or missing."
        exit 1
    fi

    log_info "LeafMC downloaded successfully (size: $(stat -c%s server.jar) bytes)."
}

# ---------- MCJars installation (for other forks) ----------
install_mcjars() {
    log_info "Installing $SOFTWARE via MCJars API..."

    if [[ "$VERSION" == "latest" ]]; then
        VERSION=$(curl -s "https://versions.mcjars.app/api/v2/builds/$SOFTWARE" | jq -r '.builds | to_entries | map(select(.value.type == "RELEASE")) | last | .key')
        if [[ -z "$VERSION" || "$VERSION" == "null" ]]; then
            echo "ERROR: Could not determine latest version for $SOFTWARE"
            exit 1
        fi
    fi

    if [[ "$BUILD" == "latest" ]]; then
        BUILD=$(curl -s "https://versions.mcjars.app/api/v1/builds/$SOFTWARE/$VERSION/latest" | jq -r '.build.id')
        if [[ -z "$BUILD" || "$BUILD" == "null" ]]; then
            echo "ERROR: Could not determine latest build for $SOFTWARE $VERSION"
            exit 1
        fi
    fi

    log_info "Software: $SOFTWARE"
    log_info "Version: $VERSION"
    log_info "Build: $BUILD"

    bash <(curl -s "https://versions.mcjars.app/api/v1/script/$BUILD/bash")

    if [[ ! -f server.jar ]]; then
        echo "ERROR: MCJars installation did not produce server.jar"
        exit 1
    fi

    log_info "MCJars installation completed."
}

# ---------- Main ----------
if [[ "$SOFTWARE" == "LEAF" ]]; then
    install_leaf
else
    install_mcjars
fi

log_info "Installation complete!"

variables.name: Software
variables.description: Server software: LEAF (default), PAPER, VELOCITY, VANILLA, etc. Case‑sensitive. Leaf uses its own API with MCJars fallback; others use MCJars.

variables.name: Version
variables.description: Minecraft version (e.g., 1.21.11, 1.20.4). 'latest' uses newest stable version (Leaf: detected via API, others via MCJars).

variables.name: Build ID
variables.description: Specific build ID (e.g., 97 for Leaf, or numeric ID for MCJars). 'latest' uses newest build.

variables.name: Server Jar File
variables.description: The name of the server jarfile to run (usually server.jar).

variables.name: Additional JVM Flags
variables.description: Custom JVM flags. For optimal performance on Leaf, use: --add-modules=jdk.incubator.vector -XX:+UseZGC -XX:-ZProactive -XX:+AlwaysPreTouch -XX:+UseStringDeduplication -XX:+UseFMA -XX:UseAVX=2 -DLeaf.enableFMA=true -DLeaf.disable-vanilla-profiler=true

variables.name: Malware Scan
variables.description: Run MCAntiMalware scan on startup (recommended). Enabled by default.

variables.name: Automatic Updating
variables.description: Automatically update server software on startup (works for Leaf and MCJars software).

variables.name: Maximum Ram Percentage
variables.description: Percentage of the server's allocated memory to use for the Minecraft heap (default 90%).

variables.name: Minehut Support
variables.description: Enable Minehut Support by adding required flags to forward player data.

variables.name: Java Agent
variables.description: ADVANCED: Set a custom java agent (e.g., SWM).

variables.name: Override Startup
variables.description: ADVANCED: Override the displayed startup command. Leave as 1.

variables.name: Log Prefix
variables.description: Internal log prefix. Do not change.
